info.title: Breaking News API Documentation
info.description: In this documentation you will be able to consult the API end points and also test all available routes. Do not forget to register and carry out the authorization.

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token

example.message: Submit email and password to log in.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all users

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items per page (default: 10, max: 50)

post.description: Creates a new user in the system

400.description: Validation error or user creation failed

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's information based on the JWT token
Returns a single user by their ID (requires authentication)

400.description: Invalid ID or user not found
Validation error, invalid ID, user not found or update failed

value.message: Submit at least one field for update.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all news

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items per page (default: 5, max: 50)

post.description: Creates a new news article (requires authentication)

400.description: Validation error or news creation failed

value.message: Submit all fields to create a news.

get.description: Search for news articles by title (requires authentication)

400.description: No news found for the search

example.message: No news found for the provided search text.

get.description: Returns all news articles created by a specific user (requires authentication)

400.description: Invalid ID or no news found for user

value.message: No news found for this user.

get.description: Returns a single news article by its ID (requires authentication)

400.description: Invalid ID or news not found

value.message: No news found for the provided id.

patch.description: Updates an existing news article (requires authentication and ownership)

400.description: Validation error, invalid ID or update failed

value.message: Submit at least one field to update.

delete.description: Deletes a news article (requires authentication and ownership)

patch.description: Toggles like on a news article (requires authentication)
Adds a comment to a news article (requires authentication)

400.description: Invalid ID, missing text field or operation failed

value.message: Submit text field to add a new comment.

patch.description: Removes a comment from a news article (requires authentication)

text.example: This is the full content of the news article...

userName.description: Name of the user who created the news

userAvatar.description: Avatar of the user who created the news

likes.description: Array of user IDs who liked the news

comments.description: Array of comments on the news

text.example: This is the full content of the news article...

NewsUpdateRequest.description: At least one field is required for update

UserUpdateRequest.description: At least one field is required for update
